data.name: OrganizationDisplayName_InvalidName
data.value: The name is invalid

data.name: Setting_InvalidDataType
data.value: The data type of the value: '{0}' is unsupported

data.name: Setting_InvalidValueType
data.value: The value type of the value: '{0}' is unsupported

data.name: OrganizationRoot_Create_SharedRequiresPerson
data.value: Must be a person to create a 'Shared' organization

data.name: OrganizationRoot_UserNotOrgOwner
data.value: Must be an organization owner to perform this action

data.name: OrganizationRoot_UserNotServiceAccount
data.value: Must be a service account to perform this action

data.name: OrganizationRoot_UserNotMember
data.value: User must be a member of this organization

data.name: OrganizationRoot_InviteMember_UserIdAndEmailMissing
data.value: Both the ID of the user and an email for the user is missing

data.name: OrganizationRoot_NoAvatar
data.value: This organization has no avatar to delete

data.name: OrganizationRoot_InviteMember_PersonalOrgMembershipNotAllowed
data.value: Cannot add another user to a 'Personal' organization

data.name: OrganizationRoot_UnInviteMember_PersonalOrg
data.value: Cannot remove any members from a 'Personal' organization

data.name: OrganizationRoot_RoleNotAssignable
data.value: Role '{0}' is not assignable to a user

data.name: OrganizationRoot_DeleteOrganization_MembersStillExist
data.value: Cannot delete this organization while any others members still exist. They must be removed from the organization first

data.name: OrganizationRoot_CanTransferBillingSubscription_TransfereeNotBillingAdmin
data.value: Must be an billing administrator to have the subscription transferred

data.name: OrganizationRoot_UserNotBillingSubscriber
data.value: Must be the subscriber of the billing subscription to perform this action

data.name: OrganizationRoot_UninviteMember_BillingSubscriber
data.value: Cannot remove the subscriber of the billing subscription from the organization

data.name: OrganizationRoot_NotBillingSubscriberNorBillingAdmin
data.value: Must be the owner of the billing subscription or be an billing administrator to perform this action

data.name: OrganizationRoot_DeleteOrganization_BillingSubscriptionCannotBeUnsubscribed
data.value: Cannot delete this organization as the billing subscription cannot be terminated in its current state

data.name: OrganizationRoot_NoSubscriber
data.value: This organization has no billing subscriber

data.name: OrganizationRoot_RegisterShared_AlreadyRegistered
data.value: This organization has already been registered

data.name: OrganizationRoot_RegisterShared_EmailDomainAlreadyRegistered
data.value: This organization already has an email domain registered

data.name: OrganizationRoot_MissingCreatorEmailAddress
data.value: CreatorEmailAddress is required to register a shared organization

data.name: OrganizationRoot_RegisterShared_EmailDomainReserved
data.value: The email domain '{0}' is already registered by another organization

data.name: OrganizationRoot_UnInviteMember_Creator
data.value: Cannot remove the creator of an organization

data.name: OrganizationRoot_OnboardingAlreadyInProgress
data.value: Onboarding cannot be restarted, it is already in progress

data.name: OrganizationRoot_OnboardingAlreadyComplete
data.value: Onboarding has already ended

data.name: OrganizationOnboardingRoot_UserNotOrgOwner
data.value: Must be an organization owner to onboard

data.name: OnboardingWorkflow_NoSteps
data.value: Workflow must have at least one step

data.name: OnboardingWorkflow_InvalidName
data.value: Workflow name is missing or invalid

data.name: OrganizationOnboardingRoot_AlreadyCompleted
data.value: Onboarding is already been completed

data.name: OrganizationOnboardingRoot_NotStarted
data.value: Onboarding has not been started

data.name: OrganizationOnboardingRoot_MoveBackward_AtStartStep
data.value: Cannot go back from the first step in the workflow

data.name: OrganizationOnboardingRoot_MoveForward_AtEndStep
data.value: Cannot go forward from the last step in the workflow

data.name: OrganizationOnboardingRoot_Navigate_UnknownStep
data.value: Cannot navigate to unknown step '{0}' in the workflow

data.name: OrganizationOnboardingRoot_Navigate_UnreachableStep
data.value: Cannot navigate to this unreachable step '{0}' in the workflow

data.name: Journey_ReplaceLastStep_NoSteps
data.value: Cannot replace last step when there are no steps

data.name: Journey_RemoveLast_NoSteps
data.value: Cannot remove last step when there are no steps

data.name: OnboardingState_RequiresCompletedDate
data.value: Complete status requires a completed time stamp

data.name: OnboardingState_InvalidCurrentStepId
data.value: StepId is missing or invalid

data.name: OnboardingState_InvalidTotalWeight
data.value: Total weight must be more than zero

data.name: OnboardingState_InvalidCompletedWeight
data.value: Completed weight '{0}' must be more than zero, and less than Total weight

data.name: Step_InvalidStepId
data.value: Step Id is missing or invalid

data.name: Step_InvalidTitle
data.value: Step Title is missing or invalid

data.name: Step_InvalidWeight
data.value: Weight must be greater than 0 and less than 100

data.name: BranchConditionschema_InvalidName
data.value: Name of the schema is invalid

data.name: BranchConditionschema_InvalidValue
data.value: Value cannot be null

data.name: BranchSchema_InvalidId
data.value: Id is missing or invalid

data.name: BranchSchema_InvalidNextStepId
data.value: NextStepId is missing or invalid

data.name: BranchSchema_InvalidLabel
data.value: Label is missing or invalid

data.name: StepSchema_InvalidId
data.value: Id is missing or invalid

data.name: StepSchema_InvalidTitle
data.value: Title is missing or invalid

data.name: StepSchema_InvalidWeight
data.value: Weight must be greater than 0 and less than 100

data.name: StepSchema_InvalidNextStepId
data.value: NextStepId is missing or invalid

data.name: StepSchema_BranchStepWithoutBranchDefinition
data.value: Branch steps must have at least one branch

data.name: StepSchema_BranchStepCannotHaveNextStepId
data.value: Branch steps cannot have a NextStepId, they must use branches to define next steps

data.name: StepSchema_NonBranchStepWithBranchDefinition
data.value: Only branch steps can have branches

data.name: StepSchema_NonTerminatingNodeWithoutNextStep
data.value: A '{0}' step must include a NextStepId

data.name: OnboardingWorkflow_InvalidStartStepId
data.value: StartStepId is missing or invalid

data.name: OnboardingWorkflow_InvalidEndStepId
data.value: EndStepId is missing or invalid

data.name: WorkflowSchema_StartStepMissingFromSteps
data.value: Start step '{0}' not found in workflow

data.name: WorkflowSchema_EndStepMissingFromSteps
data.value: End step '{0}' not found in workflow

data.name: WorkflowSchema_StartNodeIncorrectType
data.value: Start node must have type '{0}'

data.name: WorkflowSchema_EndNodeIncorrectType
data.value: End node must have type '{0}'

data.name: WorkflowSchema_DetermineNextStep_UnknownCurrentStep
data.value: Step '{0}' not found in workflow

data.name: WorkflowSchema_DetermineNextStep_EndStep
data.value: Cannot move forward from end step

data.name: WorkflowSchema_DetermineNextStep_NoNextStep
data.value: Step '{0}' has no next step defined

data.name: WorkflowSchema_CreateStateStep_UnknownStep
data.value: Step '{0}' not found in workflow

data.name: CurrentStepState_NavigateToStep_NotFromCurrentStep
data.value: Cannot navigate from step '{0}' since it is not the current step. '{1}' is the current step

data.name: CurrentStepState_NavigateToStep_UnknownNextStep
data.value: Unknown next step '{0}'

data.name: CurrentStepState_NavigateToStep_UnknownCurrentStep
data.value: Unknown current step '{0}'

data.name: CurrentStepState_NavigateToStep_ForwardFromEnd
data.value: Cannot navigate forward from 'End' step '{0}'

data.name: CurrentStepState_NavigateToStep_BackwardFromStart
data.value: Cannot navigate backward from 'Start' step '{0}'

data.name: CurrentStepState_NavigateToStep_AlreadyCompleted
data.value: Cannot navigate a completed workflow

data.name: WorkflowSchema_ValidateMove_UnknownFromStep
data.value: Step '{0}' not found in workflow

data.name: WorkflowSchema_ValidateMove_UnknownToStep
data.value: Step '{0}' not found in workflow

data.name: WorkflowSchema_ValidateMove_InvalidBranchStep
data.value: Step '{0}' does not exist on this branch, from step '{1}'

data.name: WorkflowSchema_ValidateMove_NotDirectlyReachable
data.value: Step '{0}' is not directly reachable from step '{1}'
